hero.title: Fire safety you can prove.
hero.subtitle: Your trusted partner
hero.description: Gal Impex helps buildings, offices and industrial sites stay compliant with reliable fire equipment, installation and inspection programs.

checklist.title: Quick checklist
checklist.recycling: Recycling and eco-friendly disposal of expired utilities

services.title: Services
services.description: From equipment supply to installation and ongoing maintenance — built for audits and long-term reliability.

supply.title: Equipment Supply
supply.description: Fire extinguishers, cabinets, hoses and essential fire safety equipment supplied to meet building safety requirements.

installation.title: System Installation
installation.description: Design and installation of fire alarm and suppression systems tailored to the facility and compliance standards.

inspection.title: Inspection & Refill
inspection.description: Regular inspection, testing and extinguisher refill services to keep fire protection equipment operational.

drills.title: Training & Drills
drills.description: Fire safety training and evacuation drills to prepare staff for emergency response.

reporting.title: Audit-ready Reporting
reporting.description: Clear service records, inspection logs and documentation prepared for regulatory inspections and audits.

checklists.title: Standard checklists
checklists.description: Inspection protocols aligned with MNS and NFPA.

proof.title: Proof of service
proof.description: Logs, labels and reports ready for audits.

culture.title: Safety culture
culture.description: Training programs that improve real behaviour.

trust.title: Trusted standards
trust.description: Certified and aligned with leading international fire safety standards.
